31010.name: On the Stairs
31010.description: You are standing on a set of wide stone stairs. Top of the Stairs

31011.name: Bottom of the Stairs
31011.description: You have come to the bottom landing of a set of wide stone stairs. On the Stairs

w.to_room_name: The East End of the Hall

n.to_room_name: The East End of the Hall

31013.name: The East End of the Hall
31013.description: You find yourself, yet again, in a hallway. But this time there is a door to the east and a cell door to the south. Ok. Bottom of the Stairs

31014.name: Comfy Cell
31014.description: Droplets of candle wax coat the stone floor.

31015.name: The Middle of the Hall
31015.description: You see a door made of iron bars to the south. The hallway continues.

e.to_room_name: The East End of the Hall

31016.name: Dark Cell
31016.description: This cell has a straw tick artfully strewn in the corner. West End of the Hall

31017.name: West End of the Hall
31017.description: This hallway looks like the other part of the hallway that you were in except that there is a steel door to the north and an iron-barred door to the south. pick cell You feel the mechanism release. The lock yields to your skills. Ok. Dark Cell

31018.name: Hallway
31018.description: Heavy, dank stones make up the walls of this rectangular subterranean passage. Your heart is filled with a curious dread as you wonder what is behind the heavy steel door and beyond the northern portal. pick steel.door You feel the mechanism release. The lock yields to your skills. Ok. West End of the Hall

31019.name: Implement Storage Room
31019.description: This small storage area is neatly filled with sterilized and well-maintained whips, chains, various leather restraints, small clamps (you're not sure that you want to know what these are used for), leather-covered ping-pong paddles, crops, and dull rasps.

31020.name: Naughty Dungeon
31020.description: This spacious and well-lit room is filled with a rack, an adjustable table with stirrups, and several well placed and highly polished mirrors. The ceiling and walls are hung with strategically located shackles and manacles. The devices, however, are covered in velvet, and all of the spikes and sharp edges have been dulled. Also, although you see stains, you see no sign of blood stains.

31021.name: Peephole Room
31021.description: This room has peepholes set at various heights so that a person can comfortably peer into the next room without being observed. It is tastefully decorated with small, cushioned benches and expensive tapestries. Naughty Dungeon

31022.name: Narrow Staircase
31022.description: A narrow wooden staircase leads upward. Top of Private Staircase

31054.name: Wine Cellar
31054.description: As you check the dates on the bottles you think to yourself that all this stuff should have been thrown out fifty years ago. It's a crime that someone would keep alcoholic beverages around this long without drinking them. And these bottles line all the walls except for a short break in the north wall and a space in the south wall where a door is at the end of two steep steps. l n You see nothing remarkable. l break There isn't much to see. The break is open. It is too dark to make out anything. go break

31055.name: Treasure Room
31055.description: This isn't really a treasure room. It's a room where you get squished by this slowly descending, counter-weighted slab of granite. It makes a low rumbling sound as it mashes all of your bodily juices into some small, ornately carved drains. Bummer. OUCH!! That hurt! You have DIED! Tough break... Shuffled off the Mortal Coil You are dead. Far beneath you, you perceive the great body of Ishar and the powerful sun, Rymaras, slowly circling it. Ishar's tiny moons dance lightly around awaiting their next brief encounter with Saorin. You reflect on your affair with life and vow to pay more attention to your fragile existence. Wishing to return, you reach a hand out to enter Ishar.

31056.name: Small Subterranean Chamber
31056.description: As you check the dates on the bottles you think to yourself that all this stuff should have been thrown out fifty years ago. It's a crime that someone would keep alcoholic beverages around this long without drinking them. And these bottles line all the walls except for a short break in the north wall and a space in the south wall where a door is at the end of two steep steps. go break

31057.name: Treasure Room
31057.description: This room has a nice ambiance. The ambiance of greed. It has a low coin- counting table, a low chair, and a low ceiling. You like this room very much.

31058.name: Secret Tunnel
31058.description: A heavy steel door dominates the southern end of the passage, while the northern end disappears into the darkness. Small Subterranean Chamber

31059.name: Bend in the Tunnel
31059.description: The dank walls turn sharply here. You can go west or south. Slippery Tunnel

31060.name: Slippery Tunnel
31060.description: The floor of this tunnel is slick with slime. You can go either to the east or to the west. Bend in the Tunnel

31061.name: A Bend in the Tunnel
31061.description: The dripping walls turn sharply here.

31062.name: A Jog in the Tunnel
31062.description: The tunnel switches back on itself.

31063.name: Tunnel Entrance
31063.description: A narrow arch frames the dark entrance to this tunnel.

31000.name: The Grand Gateway
31000.description: You stand before an enormous iron gate with gilded spikes running along its high, arched top. The gate is flanked by two granite monoliths whose presence speaks of great wealth, but also of great power. The monoliths rest against a high, smooth stone wall that extends around the building.

31002.name: West End of Porch
31002.description: This part of the porch is shaded not only by the roof, but by the west side of the wall.

31003.name: Center of Porch
31003.description: Huge grooved columns, topped with ornate caps, rise to at least three times your height on this platform. The porch extends to the east and west, the front door is to the north, and the main gate is to the south.

31004.name: East End of Porch
31004.description: This place is big enough that Zeno could have taught here. And it looks like a good place to drop names, too. A small stair leads to the ground eastward.

31005.name: Eastern Corner of the Villa
31005.description: This is the space that separates the rich from the poor. A small wooden gate leads north to the servants' work area, and a stair leads up to the porch.

31006.name: Work Area
31006.description: This place is full of cleaning and repairing equipment. You see a large basin for washing clothes underneath a set of clothes lines. A tiny forge is set into the wall that defines the perimeter of the grounds, and a small anvil rests on a stone slab in front of it. You see mops and brooms, rakes and hoes, small hammers, pincers, shears, and all of the implements necessary to keep a household in good order.

31007.name: At the Servants Entrance
31007.description: The earth here is pounded hard by busy feet carrying heavy things. The door leading into the house is to the west, a low, wide, iron gate leads to the east, and there is a well-used work area to the south. Ok. The Kitchen

31008.name: Entrance Room
31008.description: Gleaming onyx trim accents the lustrous marble that covers every surface in this large room. To the west are coat racks with enough space to hold all the coats of the concubines of the legendary King Hogan. Large double doors lead into the house to the north, and doors lead south to the porch.

31009.name: Top of the Stairs
31009.description: You stand on a wide stone landing. Stairs continue straight down into darkness.

31023.name: Top of Private Staircase
31023.description: Handrails provide some safety on this steep, narrow staircase. l e There isn't much to see. The east door is open. Antechamber

31024.name: The Fireplace
31024.description: You are standing in a raging fire, stupid.

31025.name: West End of Ballroom
31025.description: Gild and filigree assault your senses. Fine marble coats the walls and floor and makes up the slender columns that support the high, arching roof of this long room which continues to the east. A wide and ornately carved door also leads to the north.

31026.name: Center of Ballroom
31026.description: Lavish, garish, and gorgeous are all words that spring to mind when you see the highly polished, inlaid marble of the floor. Two columns support the vaulted ceiling in this part of the room. Stuffed divans and highly polished sideboards adorn this cavern of opulence. The room itself extends to the east and west, while huge double doors lead north. The front doors are to the south, and a spiral staircase winds gracefully upward.

31027.name: East End of Ballroom
31027.description: The fine marble that this room displays shows not only the owner's wealth, but also his good taste. The delicate veins that run through it can only be compared to the translucent skin on the nape of a beautiful woman. You drag your eyes away from the spectacle long enough to realize that the pillared height of the ceiling extends to the west, and a door of glossy mahogany leads to the north.

31028.name: Auditorium
31028.description: Low couches and overstuffed chairs are arranged in a semicircle around a low stage in the northern corner of the room. The stage has room for several musicians and their instruments. You see a door to the east and a much more elaborately carved door leading south.

31029.name: Southwest Corner of Hallway
31029.description: The carpet here is actually weaved in an L-shape so that it rounds the corner. The hallway goes north and east.

31030.name: Main Hallway
31030.description: An exquisitely woven carpet is tacked down in the center of this spacious hall. It leads to the east and west, while a door leads north and a set of double doors leads south.

31031.name: Southeast Corner of Hallway
31031.description: The carpet makes the turn in the hallway with military precision and with heavenly grace. The hall continues to the north and west.

31032.name: Western Hallway
31032.description: The carpet muffles your steps as you are forced to choose where to put them next. You can go north or south, or you can try the door to the west.

31033.name: The Flowering Garden
31033.description: Graceful statues shyly hide among the exotic and strange plants that form miniature mazes around the central well. This place brings a temporary peace to your embattled soul. Rose bushes climb a sloping protuberance in the southeast corner of the wall, and doors lead in all four directions.

31034.name: Eastern Hallway
31034.description: The carpet quiets your feet. You may go north or south, or you can try the heavy wooden door to the west. Eastern Hallway

31035.name: Dining Room
31035.description: One of the biggest tables that you have ever seen is flanked by twenty chairs. Fine crystal is displayed in a large cupboard on the east wall. Exits lead to the north, west and south.

31036.name: Purple Guest Bedroom
31036.description: A large, well-made bed dominates this room. Dark panelling contrasts pleasantly with the deep purple comforter and bed-curtains. You sense a theme. A tall wardrobe stands at attention against the west wall. You see only one exit in this room.

31037.name: Purple Sitting Room
31037.description: A small vanity attends the vain. This might be a good time to check your coiffure. Aside from the vanity there are several chairs, a small couch, and an ottoman. They are all upholstered in crushed purple velvet. A small, dainty writing table primps against the west wall. There is a door to the east and a room to the west.

31038.name: Western Hallway
31038.description: This could turn out to be the longest carpet that you have ever seen. The hall continues north and south, a door leads west and a portal leads east to a courtyard garden.

31039.name: Eastern Hallway
31039.description: That's it! This hallway is really working your nerves. So far you haven't found a seam in the carpet, which is pretty weird because if it's one piece the guy either had it made in the hall, or he built the house around it, because it wraps all the way around the courtyard hallway. The courtyard is to the west, the dining room is to the east, and the stupid hall continues to the south and to the north. Dining Room

31040.name: Green Guest Bedroom
31040.description: You're reminded of a deep forest meadow by the color of the trappings in this bedroom. An enormous bed fills the room. The mattress is so thick that you would have to pull yourself up onto it if you wanted to lie down. A wardrobe stands rigidly along the west wall. The only obvious exit from this wardrobe stands rigidly along the west wall. The only obvious exit from this room is the doorway to the east.

31041.name: Green Sitting Room
31041.description: The color of the furniture in this room is the color of the sea on a calm, misty morning. If you weren't such a busy person you might find this the perfect place to settle in with some good food and some good friends for a few good hours. But, alas, an adventurer's lot is not a sedentary one. A door leads to the east and to the west is a bedroom. Northwest Corner of Hallway

31042.name: Northwest Corner of Hallway
31042.description: The carpet makes a sharp, ninety degree turn and continues. The hallway carries it away to the south and east, and there are doors to the west and to the north. It's already open. Ok. Green Sitting Room

31043.name: Northern Hallway
31043.description: The intrepid carpet marches to and fro, to the east and to the west. In addition, a door leads north and the courtyard is south.

31044.name: Northern Hallway
31044.description: The most interesting feature of this section of the hall, aside from the ubiquitous carpet, is the door to the north. It has a small window inset in that is steamed over. The hallway runs due east and due west. Northern Hallway

31045.name: Northeastern Corner of Hallway
31045.description: Another day, another elbow. In this case, an elbow of carpet. The tiny flower pattern in the runner makes your head swim. You wonder how they keep it so clean as you notice a doorway to the east. The hallway, no matter how much you don't want it to, continues to the south and to the west. Northern Hallway

31046.name: The Kitchen
31046.description: You haven't seen a kitchen this big since you deserted the army. This one, however, does not smell of beans and potatoes. It smells of lightly battered chicken and sauteed mushrooms. Your mouth starts to water as you search the spotless counters. There are three doorways to this room, leading north, south, and west, and a narrow staircase leads upward. Northeastern Corner of Hallway

31047.name: Antechamber
31047.description: This small room ordinarily contains no furniture because there are three doors opening into it. The doors to the north and south gently ruffle the silk arras on the west wall but the door to the east slides into the wall without disturbing the air.

31048.name: Master Sitting Room
31048.description: This looks like a good place to master the art of sitting. All of the couches and chairs in this room are covered in a rich paisley brocade, and the motif is carried over into the borders of the tapestries that dampen and soften any noise. Doors lead northwest, south, and west.

31049.name: The Pleasant Bath
31049.description: The huge stone basin sunk into this floor could hold thirty bathers. A light mist caresses your skin as it rises from the heated pool. Wicker furniture is dotted about the wide tile apron that encircles the square bath. You see a small wooden door to the east and a large door with a small window to the south.

31050.name: The Sauna
31050.description: A bowl of rocks is suspended by a chain over a large brazier full of glowing coals. A small basin filled with water grips the wall. A grandstand with three tiers made of thin wood slats makes for a comfortable place to rest while the thick steam in the room leaches the poisons from your skin.

31051.name: Pantry
31051.description: This is the place where all the dry goods get placed before they are eaten. The walls are lined with shelves so close together that you can barely turn around.

31052.name: Master Bedroom
31052.description: You have lived in rooms that were smaller than the bed here. A paisley the size of a small dragon adorns the down-filled comforter that lies across the top of the mattress. A fireplace that you could walk into dominates the west wall and is faced by a large overstuffed chair. A built-in bar holds racks of colored liquids against the north wall. Doors lead southwest, southeast, and east.

31053.name: Study
31053.description: Glazed bookcases keep moisture and dust away from strange tomes and scrolls. A wide and well-used desk faces the door. A small bar is nestled in the southwest corner of the room. The only door that you see leads back out to the master bedroom. It strikes you that this room is oddly out of contrast with the rest of the house because it is so simply decorated. This must be the inner sanctum of the master of the house.

31094.name: West Corner of House
31094.description: The high, smooth wall gracefully curves from east to north. You see a stable attached to the wall north of here and you see that the huge front gate lies to the east. The Grand Gateway

31095.name: East Corner of House
31095.description: A beautiful gate stands gracefully to the west, while a tall hedge hides most of the view of the animal pens which are to the north. The Grand Gateway

31096.name: Villa Stables
31096.description: The horses here are well-kept, but they are also well-used. You see the tack neatly arranged in a corner walled by an enormous stack of hay bales. A water- trough is an undulating home to several water spiders and dead flies. You smell all the rich, moist, alfalfa odor of the equine species. The northern wall is supplied by a sheer cliff face rising a hundred feet above the roof of the shed.

31097.name: Animal Pens
31097.description: For the inhabitants of this place, this is the last stop before the table. The refuse of this smelly place is neatly raked into noisome piles. A gate allows access through the wall to the west, and a towering cliff blocks your path to the north. A passage through the hedge leads to the south.

31001.name: Gatehouse
31001.description: This room is built to protect the guards from the elements. It does so with a smooth alabaster facade, and a wide marble mantle. The Grand Gateway

31064.name: Game Room
31064.description: Several small tables with inset chessboards are placed around this room. They are accented with low, comfortable chairs. You can also see cups of dice, a horsehair dartboard, and several solid wooden puzzles.

31065.name: Billiard Room
31065.description: A felt-covered table with leather pockets stands in the center of this room. Its legs end in clawed feet. There is a doorway leading west, and the door to the north leads back to the hall.

31066.name: Top of the Stairs
31066.description: You are on the top of the wide circular staircase that leads down to largest room of the house. To the north, a hallway allows access to the upper rooms.

31067.name: Small Armory
31067.description: A halberd rack allows the weapons to be neatly stowed in this room. There is also a large, rough table, and several chairs. A narrow stairway hugs the east wall and passes through a trap-door in the ceiling.

31068.name: Dahngholds Apartment
31068.description: The bed is tightly tucked, the objects on the night table are arranged at right angles, and the uniform on the valet is crisply pressed. Without a doubt, this is the room of a military man.

31069.name: Southwest Corner of Upstairs Hallway
31069.description: It's a hallway. What do you want? There are doors to the south and west, and the passage continues to the north and east.

31070.name: Southern Upstairs Hallway
31070.description: The oak floor of this hall extends to the east and west. The spiral staircase is to the south.

31071.name: Southeast Corner of Upstairs Hallway
31071.description: Doorways lead south and east, while the passage continues to the north and west.

31072.name: Guards Quarters
31072.description: Two sets of bunk beds fill this room. There is space for a footlocker at either end of both the beds.

31073.name: The Apartment of Cyclax
31073.description: Heavy incense assaults your nostrils as you enter this room. Small wind chimes and bells made of various metals fill the air with faint tinkling sounds. The bed clothes are the color of bright, fresh blood. There are strange markings on the floor.

31074.name: Western Upstairs Hallway
31074.description: Waxed oak floors provide solid footing on your journey through the upstairs part of the house. There is a doorway to the east and a door to the west.

31075.name: Balcony
31075.description: You have stepped out onto a balcony that circles the perimeter of the courtyard below. Exits lead in all four directions.

31076.name: Eastern Upstairs Hallway
31076.description: A clear coat of wax covers the amber stain on the oak floor of this hallway. A door leads east and to the west is a portal leading outside. The hallway continues to the north and south.

31077.name: Butlers Room
31077.description: This is the room of a man who takes his job seriously. Charts on the wall give schedules for all of the household chores. The bed is made, a few books are tucked on a high shelf, polishing rags are neatly folded and stacked in a corner. Nothing is out of place.

31078.name: Drawing Room
31078.description: This is a small lounge where guests can visit each other. Two brown couches face each other next to a small fireplace while an overstuffed chair has been pushed back into one corner next to a small end table.

31079.name: Western Upstairs Hallway
31079.description: It leads north and south. A door leads west.

31081.name: Cooks Room
31081.description: Flour dust has worked its way into everything in this room. The bed is made, but it wouldn't win any awards. There are several cookbooks laying around the room in various states of disrepair.

31083.name: Northwest Corner of Upstairs Hallway
31083.description: Doors lead north and west, and the hallway continues to the south and east.

31084.name: Northern Upstairs Hallway
31084.description: The hallway continues east and west. A doorway leads to the north and a doorway leads to the south.

31085.name: Northern Upstairs Hallway
31085.description: The hallway continues east and west. A doorway leads to the north.

31086.name: Northeast Corner of Upstairs Hallway
31086.description: To the east is a narrow, short hallway. To the north is a doorway. To the south and west the passage continues.

31087.name: Service Hall
31087.description: This is a narrow hallway for servants' access. Exits are to the north and south, the passage lets out onto the main hallway to the west, and a narrow stairway leads down.

31088.name: The Apartment of Mercruses
31088.description: Everything in this apartment is definitely wrong. The floor refuses to appear level, especially where unfocused sigils dance in geometric irregularity. The room also smells variously of tomcats, jellybeans, and chalk dust. You think that there is a bed in here somewhere.

31089.name: Doormaids Room
31089.description: This room is provided with a small bed and a tiny vanity.

31090.name: Attendants Quarters
31090.description: Three small beds sit in this room, but only one of them looks as though it has been recently used.

31091.name: Maids Quarters
31091.description: Two single beds wait patiently for their owners to return to them. This room is clean and tidy, although it is none too cheery.

31092.name: Utility Room
31092.description: This room has a square work table and two chairs. Scraps of material and bits of leather are arranged in piles along one wall.

31093.name: Observatory Tower
31093.description: This small tower allows guards to see the surrounding area for a very long distance. It is furnished with a chair, a table, and a small brazier.
